title: LA SFR — Type V-B, 3 stories non-sprinklered (exceeds Table 504.4 1-story sprinkler-reduced limit)

ground_truth.rationale: 3 stories exceeds 1-story non-sprinklered limit for R-2/V-B
Plans explicitly state non-sprinklered; required for this configuration
